title: 5X-Large SQL warehouse size (Beta)
body:
The 5X-Large cluster size for serverless and pro SQL warehouses is now available in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). For serverless SQL warehouses, 5X-Large is available in all supported regions. Workspace admins can control access to this feature from the **Previews** page. See [Manage Databricks previews](/aws/en/admin/workspace-settings/manage-previews).

For more information on SQL warehouse sizing, see [SQL warehouse sizing, scaling, and queuing behavior](/aws/en/compute/sql-warehouse/warehouse-behavior).

ref_links.text: SQL warehouse sizing, scaling, and queuing behavior
